title: GANT Sweater — Navy Blue
image_captions: Navy blue GANT V-neck sweater with gold trim on collar, cuffs, and hem. Small embroidered logo reading 'GANT' on the left chest.
Navy blue GANT V-neck sweater with gold trim on collar, cuffs, and hem. Small embroidered logo reading 'GANT' on the left chest.
Back view showing navy blue knit fabric with gold embroidered GANT logo and shield crest.
Neck tag reading GANT Size L. Care label showing 100% Pima Cotton.
Neck tag reading GANT Size L. Care label showing Pima Cotton. Front view showing Navy Blue V-neck sweater with GANT logo on chest and cream-colored lining.
Vertical tape measure showing 70cm at hem edge; Horizontal tape measure showing 34cm. Dark navy knit sleeve with ribbed cuffs on cream background.
Horizontal tape measure showing 50cm at the garment edge.
Neck tag reading [Brand] Size [Size]. Care label showing 100% COTTON. Back view showing navy blue ribbed fabric with beige stripe.
Back view showing navy blue long-sleeved sweater with ribbed hem and cuffs.
enhanced_description:
GANT V-Neck Sweater — Navy Blue
Brand: GANT
Size: L
Condition: Excellent
Composition: 100% Pima Cotton
Color: Navy Blue

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 34cm
Length: 70cm

About the Piece
Elevate your wardrobe with this classic navy blue GANT sweater. Crafted from premium 100% Pima cotton, it offers a luxurious softness and breathable comfort perfect for layering or wearing alone. The timeless V-neck silhouette provides a flattering fit, while the rich navy hue adds a touch of sophistication to any outfit.

Style Note: Minimalist Elegance
Perfect for creating polished looks that balance comfort with style. Ideal for pairing with tailored trousers, jeans, or a denim jacket for a versatile everyday aesthetic.

Key Detail: Gold Trim & Embroidered Logo
This piece features distinctive gold trim along the collar, cuffs, and hem, adding a subtle luxury touch to the classic design. The chest displays a small embroidered GANT logo, while the back showcases an embroidered shield crest, highlighting the brand's attention to detail.
